Now accepting early applications

The gap between your product and international growth isn't strategy. It's senior talent with the networks to open it.

Fractional diaspora talent. Vetted & Scoped. Platform-managed.

BridgeScale matches Indian startups and MSMEs with vetted diaspora sales leaders, pipeline builders, and BD operators — for fractional, scoped engagements that produce real commercial outcomes in international markets.

The gap we're closing

Two groups who need each other. No good way to connect.

Indian startups want to break into international markets. Diaspora senior talent have the networks and market fluency. The friction is structural — not personal.

Indian startups & MSMEs
Serious about going global. Not set up to hire for it full-time.
  • —Don't know exactly what commercial capability gap they have
  • —Can't afford — or justify — a full-time senior international hire
  • —No trusted access to senior talent who've already navigated their target markets
  • —Need scoped execution, not another informal advisory relationship
  • —Want flexibility — cash, retainer, success-based, or hybrid fractional structures
Indian diaspora senior talent
Ready to contribute back home. Only on professional terms.
  • —Advisory on diaspora networks goes uncompensated — senior talent disengage fast
  • —Want structured, scoped, paid fractional engagements — not informal calls that go nowhere
  • —Prefer part-time or project-based formats compatible with their existing full-time role
  • —Want equity upside through documented hybrid or FAST structures — not a vague promise
  • —Need cross-border contracting, payments, and EOR handled so they can focus on delivery
Why fractional. Why now.

The model has crossed a threshold. The timing is structural.

Fractional hiring isn't a workaround. It's the operating model for companies that need senior talent without the overhead, and for professionals who want to deploy expertise without a career disruption.

73%

of high-growth startups cite lack of senior GTM talent as their primary barrier to international expansion

4×

faster time-to-market when companies engage fractional senior talent vs. hiring full-time for new geographies

$0

full-time salary required — structured fractional retainers start at a fraction of a senior hire's total cost

Sources: McKinsey Global Institute · Fractional Executive Association · Industry benchmark data
What we offer

Three categories. One focus: international commercial growth.

Every fractional talent category maps directly to a scoped international growth outcome for Indian startups and MSMEs.

01
Fractional sales leadership
Senior revenue talent who define and lead your international sales motion fractionally — strategy through execution.
Fractional VP SalesFractional CROHead of SalesRevenue leaders
02
Fractional sales execution
Hands-on pipeline generators who prospect, qualify, and advance deals in your target international markets.
Fractional SDR / BDRAccount ExecutiveOutbound operatorsPipeline generation
03
Fractional partnerships & BD
Talent who build channels, develop reseller networks, and open markets through partnerships — on a fractional basis.
Channel developmentReseller / distributorAlliancesMarket entry
Cross-capability areas
GTM strategy & refinementICP & messaging clarityCommercial systems improvementRevenue operating cadenceFounder-led sales transitionAI in sales workflowInternational market entry
Why BridgeScale

The advantages aren't just about cost. They're structural.

Fractional hiring through a managed platform removes risks that a job board, a LinkedIn search, or a warm introduction simply can't address.

01
De-risk your international growth hire
→ Prove value in a sprint before committing to a retainer
02
Unlock markets through existing relationships
→ First qualified meetings in weeks, not 6–9 months
03
Eliminate cultural misalignment
→ Cultural fluency no job board can replicate
04
Speed to market — not months of ramping
→ First commercial activity in weeks, not a quarter
05
Start small. Scale what works.
→ Modular structures with clear expansion or exit at every stage
06
Senior talent you couldn't otherwise access
→ Access the top 5% of diaspora senior talent, available no other way
Standards & principles

How we operate. What we won't compromise.

Vetting
Every professional is rigorously screened.

Verified references from past clients and employers. A live expert interview. A domain-specific assessment — case study pitch for sales roles, turnaround narrative for leadership. Acceptance rate under 15%.

Intelligence
AI does the heavy lifting. Humans make the calls.

AI assists with need diagnosis, talent matching, scope drafting, and engagement health monitoring. Every recommendation is reviewable and overridable. Shortlists are reviewed by platform staff before companies see them.

Principles
Fractional-first. Curated, not open.

Diagnosis before matching. Execution is the product. Rewarded engagement, not unpaid mentorship. Built for Indian startups and MSMEs — not enterprises. The quality of the network is the product.

Early access

Request your spot.

We're reviewing early applications from both sides. Tell us who you are — we'll follow up within 3–5 business days.
